# HTML Test Documents

HTML file preview feature testing documents.

## Structure

### Core HTML Tests (Root)

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| 01-basic-structure.html | Basic HTML document structure and semantic elements |
| 02-text-and-typography.html | Headings, paragraphs, inline formatting, and text styling |
| 03-tables-and-lists.html | Tables with various layouts, ordered/unordered/definition lists |
| 04-forms-and-inputs.html | Form elements, input types, and interactive controls |
| 05-media-and-embeds.html | Images, SVG, video/audio placeholders, and embedded content |
| 06-css-styling.html | CSS features: variables, grid, flexbox, animations, and responsive design |

### Edge Cases (`edge-cases/`)

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| minimal.html | Minimal valid HTML document |
| no-doctype.html | HTML without doctype declaration |
| fragment.html | HTML fragment without html/head/body tags |
| special-chars.html | Unicode, emoji, CJK characters, and HTML entities |
